name: Nanoplus Ltd.
summary: Nanoplus Ltd. engages in the production, purification, grading, and development of nano diamond powder. The company is also involved in the research and development, and production of thermal materials for thermal dissipation. In addition, it offers environmental wastewater treatment. Further, the company provides laser processing technology solutions. The company was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.
